name: ccr-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the CCR plugin — adaptive multi-model code reviewer.

plugins.name: quality
plugins.description: Adaptive multi-model code reviewer (CCR). Reviews GitLab MRs, local diffs, Go files, and Go packages. Routes 4-14 reviewer passes across Logic/Security/Concurrency/Performance/Requirements personas, verifies consolidated findings, and posts approved inline comments for MR mode.
